content: Procurement-to-inventory data flow: (1) Staff selects supplier and adds products as line items to a PO (status=DRAFT); (2) PO submitted for ordering (status=ORDERED, order_date set); (3) Goods arrive — staff opens PO and records a Goods Receipt (GR) — for each line item, qty_received is set; (4) System validates qty_received against qty_ordered; (5) System creates one stock_transaction record per product with type=IN and reference_type=PO_RECEIPT; (6) Inventory current_quantity increments; (7) PO status transitions to RECEIVED. This ensures full audit trail linking stock movement back to the originating PO.
